creator: raimeetravel
caption:
possibly the BEST summer euro destination? & here’s everything I did there! It took me way too long to finally visit and I’m planning to go back this summer too! 

Have you been?

🇩🇰 Neighborhoods to explore: 

* Nørrebro
* Vesterbro
* Refshaleøen
* Nordvest
* Østerbro
* Christianshavn
* Islands Brygge
* Carlsberg Byen

For my full guide, comment CPH and I’ll send to you! 

#copenhagen #denmark #copenhagentravel

transcription.text: we are getting off of eaten path in copenhagen. skip the main shopping street and go straight to the meatpacking district. this is a working district and somehow it became the coolest nightlife and gallery area in the city. there's also a ton of great restaurants and coffee shops around here. then take the harbor bus over to this former industrial island. it's now the most creative neighborhood in copenhagen. you can check out the contemporary art museum which is great and don't miss refen street food market. it's my favorite place to grab lunch. there's options from all over the world and it's relatively affordable. you also shouldn't miss walking around these two neighborhoods. okay and now a few things to know. get a city card. it'll cover the harbor buses which are genuinely the best way to move around. rent a bike. the whole city is flat and everyone cycles and i highly recommend going april through june. spring and early summer before the crowds is the best time to visit copenhagen. have the best trip. safe travels. bye!
